title: podman run: exit status is 0 after signal
body:
`podman run` passes through an error exit, but not a signal exit:

    a# podman run --rm --name foo registry.access.redhat.com/rhel7/rhel:latest sleep 60

In another shell:

    b# podman kill foo
    <sha>

Back to first shell:

    a# echo $?
    0

Expected: 137

comments.body: Ping, just checking in: this behavior is still present in podman-0.3.5-1.gitdb6bf9e.fc27.x86_64
This one is really confusing to me - we should be picking up the exit code of the container and setting our exit code to it regardless of what kills the container
This may have something to do with https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/pull/1513 - will need to check if it's fixed after we get a Conmon with that patch.
yes this should be fixed by: https://github.com/kubernetes-incubator/cri-o/pull/1513
Need to verify that we have this conmon in all our builds
